meta.title: WordPing — Learn English Smarter
meta.description: A smart flashcard app with daily reminders, beautiful themes, and AI-powered meanings for serious English learners.

hero.subtitle: WordPing helps you remember vocabulary through simple flashcards and daily push notifications — study anywhere, anytime.
hero.cta: Coming Soon on the App Store

reminders.title: Smart word reminders
reminders.desc: Set custom push notifications for each folder. Daily reminders keep you on track without interrupting your day.

flashcards.title: Flip-card vocabulary review
flashcards.desc: Swipe through cards, flip to reveal meanings, and track your memory level for every word.

notes.title: Custom meanings & notes
notes.desc: Add your own translations, context notes, and example sentences so words stick in your memory.

themes.title: Beautiful skins & themes
themes.desc: Choose from 11+ solid color themes or premium wallpaper skins like Sakura, Deep Sea, and Night City.

1.title: Add a word
1.desc: Save any English word or phrase you encounter. One tap is all it takes.

2.title: Write meaning & note
2.desc: Add your own translation and a personal note to make the word stick.

3.title: Get reminders
3.desc: WordPing sends push notifications so you never forget to study.

4.title: Review anytime
4.desc: Flip cards, take tests, and reinforce your vocabulary at your own pace.

premium.title: Unlock the full experience.
premium.subtitle: More colors, premium wallpaper skins, and deeper personalization.
premium.colors_desc: Match your mood with solid color themes — blue, teal, pink, and more.
premium.skins_desc: Sakura, Night City, Deep Sea, Aurora, and more stunning skins.
premium.personal_desc: Flip, reorder, and test your vocabulary exactly the way you want.

cta.title: WordPing is coming soon.
cta.subtitle: Be the first to know when it launches on the App Store.
cta.button: Coming Soon on the App Store

footer.tagline: Built for learners who mean it.
